description: Approved meta description template variants. NOT yet consumed — activate_when meta_pattern_weights moves to ACTIVE.
activate_when: Meta selection logic is added to lib/lane-page-schema.js

default.template: Ship {mode} freight from {origin} to {destination}. {transit_range} transit, {carrier_count} vetted carriers, real-time tracking. Get instant quotes from WARP.

cost_forward.template: Get {mode} shipping rates from {origin} to {destination}. Per-pallet pricing, {transit_range} transit, no hidden fees. Quote instantly with WARP.
cost_forward.notes: Leads with pricing for cost-intent queries.

proof_forward.template: {mode} freight from {origin} to {destination} with {carrier_count} carriers and cross-dock facilities. {transit_range} transit. Real-time tracking and managed delivery.
proof_forward.notes: Leads with network proof for trust-building.

speed_forward.template: {transit_range} {mode} transit from {origin} to {destination}. Quote in seconds, book instantly, track in real time. WARP managed freight.
speed_forward.notes: Leads with speed signals for urgency-intent queries.
